question: Why did Volt EV battery thermal-event flags spike 3.1x in cold-climate markets last week, while warm markets held?
metric_label: Thermal-event flags by powertrain and climate zone, weekly

upstream_models.description: Parsed thermal-event signals from the Kafka telemetry stream. Includes battery_temp_c, thermal_event_flag, preconditioning_mode, and ota_firmware_version keyed on vehicle_id + event_timestamp.
Vehicle master joining SAP production records with Dealertrack registration data. Carries powertrain_type, model_year, ota_channel, and delivery_region.
Zip-to-climate-zone lookup derived from NOAA historical averages. Classifies each zip as cold (avg Jan temp below 20 F), temperate, or warm. Joins to int_vehicle_spine via dealer_zip.
OTA push history from the Connected Vehicle platform. Includes firmware_version, rollout_start_at, rollout_pct, and affected_powertrain. Used to correlate flag spikes with specific OTA versions.
